Biography:
From 2017, The Enveloper has been exclusively producing Techno creating dark and rousing sounds that sparked his fascination in the first place.
The Enveloper is one of the emerging artists of the new generation of techno musicians, consistently delivering high-quality productions. Since 2017 he has been exclusively producing techno, creating dark and rousing sounds that ignited his fascination with the genre.

His tracks have been released on top labels such as IAMT, Orange Recordings, Reload Records and Animarum, gaining international recognition from established figures in the techno scene, including The Yellowheads, Spartaque and many others. As a result, his tracks have found their way into the best clubs and biggest festivals worldwide.

The DJ sets and music productions by The Enveloper are characterized by their energetic and captivating nature. His tracks regularly chart in the top positions of the techno charts and receive support from around the world.

Rooney Nasr is a 21‑year‑old Lebanese DJ/producer whose deep, groovy sets have racked up 500 K+ Spotify streams. Founder of Pitchfork Beirut, co‑owner of EKSTASIS and Bionic Room, and manager of the underground club Projekt, he’s a key tastemaker in Beirut’s electronic scene.
EquipmentUsed:
3 × Pioneer CDJ‑3000 (USB/Link)
Pioneer DJM‑900 NXS2 mixer
2 × Technics SL‑1210 MK2
Allen & Heath Xone K2 MIDI controller
Sennheiser HD‑25 headphones
EquipmentRequired:
Minimum: 3 × Pioneer CDJ‑2000 NXS2 or CDJ‑3000 (latest firmware, linked)
1 × Pioneer DJM‑900 NXS2 mixer (no substitutes)
2 × 12‑inch booth monitors (independent volume) positioned ear‑height
Stable DJ table, 100–110 cm height, vibration‑free
2 × IEC power sockets (230 V) behind mixer
TechnicalRider:
FOH PA ≥ 20 kW line‑array or well‑tuned club system; FLAT response ±3 dB
Booth monitors fed from mixer booth‑out
Stage lighting to avoid direct glare on CDJ screens
Minimum 45 min sound check window
FOH engineer present during set
Rider:
Flights: 1 × economy upgradeable to business if >4 h

Ground: airport pick‑up + return

Hotel: 4‑star min, late checkout 14:00, non‑smoking king bed

Dressing room with secure Wi‑Fi, mirror, towels
Refreshments: still & sparkling water, fresh orange juice, coconut water, assorted fruit, mixed nuts, energy bars, espresso machine or quality coffee
Drinks on stage: 6 × 500 ml water, 2 × coconut water, 1 × premium tequila (Patrón, Don Julio) + fresh lime
Meal: healthy hot meal or €40 buy‑out
Guest list: 5 names
OtherRequirements:
Access to booth 30 min pre‑set for USB prep
Local SIM or hotspot on request

Biography:
This promising duo has already developed a notorious reputation all over Belgium. Joyhauser holds up an impressive arsenal of hard-hitting beats accompanied by captivating and melancholic strings.
This promising duo has already developed a notorious reputation all over Belgium. Joyhauser holds up an impressive arsenal of hard-hitting beats accompanied by captivating and melancholic strings. Raw techno mixed with epic harmonies are the main ingredients of their signature sound.

They played and were praised at just about every single club in Belgium, they performed at several big festivals such as Extrema Outdoor, Tomorrowland and Pukkelpop. They are swiftly conquering other countries as well with visits to Spain, France and Holland. As a freshly introduced member of the Labyrinth family you can be sure that their thriumphal march won’t stop here.

Masked in mystery and driven by power, YouSawLaurent is the raw force storming through the European hard techno scene. Known for his explosive basslines and relentless energy behind the decks, the German-born artist has earned a reputation for sonic intensity and hypnotic precision, earning him the title “Kickmaster” in Turkey before he was even old enough to vote.

Performing behind a mask until the final climactic drop, his identity is revealed only at the peak of each set, when the message lands: You saw Laurent. More than a DJ, he is a live ritual. A performer who turns every stage into a battlefield of rhythm, pressure and release.

With international sets from Berlin to Krakow, Istanbul to Basel, and appearances at venues like Club Ost, Matrix Bochum and Gotec Club Karlsruhe, his name is fast becoming a symbol of rising power in Europe’s underground.

This is not performance. This is presence.
This is YouSawLaurent.
EquipmentUsed:
3 × Pioneer CDJ-3000
- 1 × Pioneer DJM-A9 or DJM-900NXS2 mixer
- Standard booth monitors (e.g. 2 × Pioneer VM series)
- Optional: Technics turntables (if vinyl set)
EquipmentRequired:
- Quality PA system (line array, mains + subs) with full sound support
- Full lighting rig & stage visuals (if indicated)
- Booth setup with 3 CDJ + mixer + power
- 2 × good booth monitors
TechnicalRider:
Clean, dry, secure booth area
- Cable patching (XLR, power, breakout) from DJ setup to FOH
- Backup media players (if possible)
- Soundcheck minimum 2 hours prior to doors
Rider:
- 5 × bottled water (room temp)
- Towels
- Healthy snacks (fruit, nuts)
- Towels & hand wipes
- Hospitality (backstage lounge, seating)
OtherRequirements:
- Quiet / private dressing room
- Security escort if needed
- Transport from airport to hotel to venue
- Hotel (4-5 star) for night(s) stay

With a passion for raw, high-energy beats, his music blends deep, pulsating basslines with intricate rhythms, creating an immersive experience on the dancefloor. Drawing inspiration from a wide range of techno subgenres, SEMPLE’s productions are marked by their dynamic energy and relentless pace, making him a standout figure in the electronic music scene. His electrifying performances and unique sound have earned him a loyal following and a place at prominent clubs and festivals across The Netherlands

Her background in sound design and audio engineering gives each set a precise yet energetic edge. Supported by HATE, Techno Germany, and MOTZ, Lucyd has played across Europe at renowned venues including About Blank, OXI, Kit Kat, Renate, Anomalie, and ADE. Her performances blend texture, movement, and bass for a truly driven club experience.

Biography:
Evolution has seemingly implanted an incredibly deep passion and authentic fervor for techno in every cell of BJØRNSON's body and soul. This profound connection isn't just audible in his powerful and pulsating productions but is also palpable during his performances - his sets catapult listeners into a uniquely different world, offering a metaphysical experience that is truly unparalleled.
Based in Stuttgart, this DJ and producer has honed his talent for peaktime techno sound over the past decade. Without a doubt, he is swiftly emerging as one of the standout names among a fresh surge of underground stars.
With an expanding discography of quality cuts and numerous performances alongside electronic music's elite, Bjørnson's global recognition is not only imminent but well-deserved. His exclusive sets for MIXMAG and Transmission's New York radio show have not only reached a global audience but continue to make waves.

His productions and remixes can now be found on essential labels such as KD raw, Tregambe, Hypnostate and Memoro. Regularly supported and featured in the Drumcode Radio Show, as well as played live in clubs by acts like Richie Hawtin, Joris Voorn, Alex Stein, and Marco Faraone.
Recognized as one of the National Breakthrough Artists by FAZEmag in 2024 and spotlighted by international media heavyweights like MIXMAG, his passion for Techno continues to take root and is resonating around the world…
ResidentLocation: Fridas Pier, Stuttgart | Tanzhaus West, Frankfurt

With experience across national venues and festivals, Steve’s performances are crafted to ignite dance-floors and create unforgettable party moments.

He fuses melodic techno and techno into immersive sets, building on Eastern European club lineage while embracing the Dutch underground. Known for energetic performances in venues across Amsterdam and beyond.

Driven by a passion for weaving moods and movement into seamless sets, he is steadily shaping his identity as a go-to name in Hungary’s growing club circuit and beyond.

Born in South Africa and now based in Berlin, she has made a significant mark performing in clubs and festivals across Europe, India and South Africa. Her journey includes studying music production at Soul Candi in South Africa, and she brings high-octane, energy-filled sets that leave crowds awestruck.

Biography: This Amsterdam DJ/Producer started as classical pianist and finished her studies at the conservatorium and she found later her passion in the world of techno. She plays in the Netherlands and abroad, from clubs and festivals in Germany to Brasil and Colombia. As electronic music producer, she released her first EP ‘Orange Power’ for Finder records. After that, she focussed more on DJing and organizing events in Amsterdam and Berlin. This year, she finds more time for producing again. As DJ she is known for her fast, driving and energetic techno sets mixed with other (sub)genres. She prefers to align her mixes with the vibe of the moment. That is why she might mix industrial or hard techno with Brazilian funk, for example. Her beats trigger people to dance and the melodic elements trigger them to feel the direct connection with one inner self and the people around us. Music means to her: feeling free, dancing, connecting (with) people and having a good time.

Gaya Carmeli is a rising techno DJ and producer based in Amsterdam, known for high-energy sets that blend acid, peak-time, and hard techno. Drawn to the city to reconnect with her Dutch roots, Gaya dove head-first into electronic music. She actively performs and releases music, steadily building a name through dedication and fierce dance-floor moments.
EquipmentUsed: 2 × CDJ-2000NXS2 or CDJ-3000 + DJM-900NXS2 / Pioneer equivalent
EquipmentRequired: Standard DJ booth with stable table surface, 2 × CDJ-2000NXS2 or 3000, DJM-900NXS2 mixer, 2 × booth monitors
TechnicalRider: Booth monitors positioned at ear level left and right. No redlining on the mixer. Clean and stable table or riser for performance.
Rider: 1 bottle of still water, 2 drink tokens or non-alcoholic options. Quiet green room preferred but not required.
OtherRequirements: 30 minutes soundcheck if possible. Access to stage before opening where possible.

Biography: NOZZ is an Argentinian DJ and producer based in Madrid with a high-voltage Rave Techno sound that blends hard techno power with rock attitude. His shows often feature live electric guitar which adds a raw edge and crowd-locking energy. Branded The Madboy and Master of Disaster he channels a peak-time feel that turns floors into full-throttle moments.

Biography: WITHIN is a hard techno project based in Amsterdam focused on high BPM energy and cutting industrial soundscapes. Known for fast rhythmic intensity and raw rave pressure, WITHIN delivers sets that build tension, release chaos and hold the dancefloor without compromise. Driven by underground culture and built for warehouse environments, WITHIN pushes sonic boundaries to create a full-body experience.

inKKiss is a Polish-born DJ and producer now based in the Netherlands, whose sonic identity spans dark, hypnotic techno through to raw hard‐rave energy.  Rooted in subterranean soundscapes, her sets fuse haunting melodic undertones with heavy distortion and relentless rhythm, making each performance a journey rather than a playlist. 

With a growing profile across Europe’s underground circuits, inKKiss is forging a path for hard-techno artists who refuse to compromise intensity for accessibility.

Tombo (IT) is a dynamic and talented DJ and producer of hard techno music, hailing from Italy. His passion for electronic music has deep roots in the Italian underground, where he began his artistic journey. From the early days in the scene, Tombo has demonstrated an innate ability to create engaging sonic experiences that blend powerful rhythms and hypnotic atmospheres.

With a series of debut releases on notable labels such as The Acid Mind, Ganzer Takt, Rewasted and DSR digital Tombo has quickly gained a solid reputation in the hard techno music scene. His music transports the listener on an intense and captivating journey, reflecting his deep passion for underground electronic music.

Biography:
Gustavo Adade is a DJ and producer based in Amsterdam known for fast paced techno and hard hitting club energy. His sets move with intention balancing power precision and atmosphere to create a flow that keeps the room locked in from start to finish.

Active within the scene as both an artist and creative contributor he is also the founder of Resilient Apparel and Evidance reflecting his link between culture community and sound. With growing releases and consistent club appearances Gustavo continues to shape his identity in the European techno landscape pushing a style that is relentless uplifting and made for dancefloor connection.

Label boss of Moments In Time and founder of the Make Me A DJ music school he has become a key voice in shaping the new generation of UK techno. His sound blends heavy rhythms with trance touched tension and rolling grooves built for the rave.

Biography:
Between strobe lights, sweat, and heavy kicks, his fascination with DJing grew in Berlin’s techno scene and in 2024 he was behind the decks himself. His sound is characterized by energetic layered style and driving basslines.

Øxenkracher feels most at home in the worlds of hard techno, schranz, and industrial delivering high-impact club energy everywhere he plays.

CØPTER is a hard techno DJ based in Utrecht in the Netherlands. She is known for fast energetic sets and relentless underground energy built for late night club rooms and warehouse shows.

Part of the Obsidia community she represents the new wave of Dutch hard techno with a strong visual identity and a sharp ear for high impact tracks that keep the floor moving from start to finish.

Koshmar is a hard techno DJ and producer known for raw intensity and a signature dark aesthetic. His sound blends industrial pressure, sharp rhythms and relentless energy crafted for late night club rooms and high-impact warehouse floors.

He delivers heavy, fast and atmospheric sets supported by bold visuals and a strong artistic identity. Koshmar continues to push his sound across Germany and Europe, shaping his place in the new wave of underground techno.

Alchemic is a South African born producer based in the Netherlands crafting dark and ethereal techno that pulls listeners into hypnotic, otherworldly states. His music blends eerie textures with pulsing low end energy, exploring the transformation of emotion into rhythm a sonic reflection of inner alchemy.

Inspired by artists like POST PARANOIA, Rene Wise, DVS1, Setoac Mass, Ignez, Bailey Ibes, Daryn Steytler, Philberg and MARRON Alchemic’s work embodies a balance of chaos and clarity, inviting listeners to experience beauty in darkness.

Biography:
Trinity is the project of Natalia Zygmunt, a hard techno and industrial artist shaped by the Polish underground rave movement and now based in the Netherlands. Her sets are driven by raw energy, hypnotic groove, and an intense storytelling style that blends hard kicks with emotional depth.

Raised in the underground and performing across Europe, she aims to take the crowd into her “Trinity Era”, a space built on inner-world exploration, atmospheric textures, and industrial power. Her sound sits firmly in the harder spectrum of techno, with an emphasis on rhythm, narrative, and dark rave culture.

Biography:
Khalid Alkurdi is a Syrian–Dutch hard techno and rave artist pushing a powerful, peak-time sound from the Netherlands. His sets move between industrial textures, trance-infused melodies, and hardcore energy, creating an explosive atmosphere designed for full-capacity floors.

With a growing following across Europe and releases such as Bass Drop, Khalid focuses on fast, driving rhythms, sharp percussion, and emotional build-ups that keep the crowd locked in from start to finish. His style sits firmly in the harder spectrum: high BPM, heavy kicks, and precise transitions that maintain tension while still feeling musical and accessible.

Pink Panda are an internationally recognised DJ and producer group known for high-energy performances and standout remixes across the global dance scene. Ranked in the DJ Mag Top 100 for five consecutive years they have performed on major festival stages worldwide including Creamfields Ultra Music Festival and multiple international tours. Their official remixes span some of the biggest names in pop and dance including David Guetta Sia Dua Lipa Elton John Britney Spears Ava Max Meduza Bob Sinclar Bruno Mars and more. Their productions bring a polished melodic dance sound that blends festival-ready impact with mainstream accessibility.

Biography: Lockdown is a high-impact electronic music act known for explosive festival-driven sound design and large-scale collaborations. The project has released records with Timmy Trumpet Carnage Steve Aoki Showtek Mariana Bo MaRLo Rave Republic Dr. Phunk and Ben Nicky. Lockdown recently released the official remix of Showtek’s global hit Booyah and saw viral success with Bloody Mary which has been certified Platinum and Silver. Their performances are built for peak-time festival energy combining hard melodic drops and emotional build-ups that move crowds in large-room and outdoor environments.

Biography: Astúria is a DJ and music producer of Brazilian origin, based in France since 2019. A trained pianist, she draws influence from the sun-soaked parties of her homeland where music blends joy, rhythm, and freedom. Her sets move between deep house, afro/latin house, tech house, Brazilian bass, and tribal influences, creating a warm and energetic atmosphere. With her melodic storytelling and Latin-rooted grooves, Astúria invites listeners on a journey designed to make them dance, travel, and feel connected.

Biography: Viresha is a Swedish DJ and producer creating music for the soul. She began her music journey at the age of 48 after surviving breast cancer, a transformative moment that awakened a deep creative energy from within. Her sound blends emotional depth with rhythmic power, creating a spiritual and dance-driven listening experience. With an artistic path that has also led to affiliation with Tomorrowland, Viresha is steadily carving out her place in the global melodic and organic house community, inviting audiences into a journey of healing, rhythm, and creative expression.

Biography:
MIESØ — pronounced like miso (yes, like the soup) is the alias of Michelle, a 26-year-old Dutch DJ. The name is a playful nod to her heritage and her nickname “Mies.” Growing up in a musical family, she always knew music was her path, but in 2023 she discovered that DJ’ing, especially electronic music, was her real calling.
Her sets move between bouncy euphoria and heavy, driving bass. Known for her hard-bounce and hard techno sound, she blends melodic intros, nostalgic throwbacks, and destructive drops into a signature mix of emotion, energy, and punch.

Her dedication paid off quickly: after her first gig in January 2025, she was invited to play at Club BASIS Talent Nights and Grijs Gebied, sharing the stage with artists like Franky-B, Jånks, Technika, and Juul Exler. Since then, she’s been shaping her sound further, both behind the decks and in the studio, where her style continues to evolve with every track she creates

Biography:
PHYXX is a DJ and producer from Almería whose connection with music began at a very young age. His artistic identity took shape in the Spanish underground where he discovered the sound that would become his true language. Initially rooted in hard groove, his style evolved into a purer and more mental form of techno shaped by rhythmic pressure, dark layers and constant tension that envelopes the listener.

His career includes remixes for artists like Pirfter on Mindtrip and collaborations with respected labels including TMM Records and DarkForest. PHYXX has released music on platforms across the scene such as Diffuse Reality, DSNGD and ETHNIC MEETING, placing him steadily at the forefront of contemporary techno.

He is also the founder of Echofarm, a label born as an extension of his artistic vision: a space for authentic minimal proposals that stay closely connected to the essence of introspective and powerful techno.

Starting as a local club regular, he has grown into a festival and international performer, appearing at Weekender Festival, Jersey Live and Entice Ibiza. His releases on Damaged Records and Octagon Discs have received support from major names across the techno and trance circuit. Focused, driven and evolving, LUCUZ brings a high-impact sound built for peak-time dancefloors.

Biography: Born in Iran and now based in Belgium, PEZAR fuses his rich heritage of Persian modes and Kurdish melodies with contemporary Afro melodic House/techno. He specializes in the art of making people dance, expertly building atmosphere, tension, and groove. PEZAR creates the ideal emotional bridge from introspective moments to dancefloor readiness, preparing crowds at venues like Caféina, Club Versuz, resident dj at Skybar Antwerp and events & festivals across Europe for the night ahead.

As a Bass-scene girl by heart, she often blends this with Drum'N Bass and Dubstep, making that her signature sound.

Biography:
NoNameLeft is a peak time techno duo from Budapest shaping a distinctive sound marked by dark atmospheres, tight percussion, and powerful low-end energy. Their music blends raw drive with hypnotic sequences designed for peak-hour dancefloors. Known for precision and intensity in both studio productions and live performances, they consistently deliver a cinematic, forward-leaning techno experience.

With a growing international following and releases supported across the scene, NoNameLeft continues to push their signature sound, building momentum across clubs and festivals throughout Europe.

Biography:
EL PADRE is a Poland-based DJ and melodic techno producer whose performances transcend traditional club spaces and evolve into contemporary rituals of sound, emotion, and transformation. Recognised for his ability to merge the roots of electronic music with cutting-edge digital mysticism, he guides audiences through immersive journeys where past and future meet. His sets are crafted as portals into alternate dimensions shaped by deep grooves, cinematic harmonies, and evolving AI-driven landscapes.

Drawing inspiration from the masters who defined house and techno, EL PADRE honours the legacy of the scene while pushing its limits into new territory. His artistry embodies the role of a modern shaman: opening gateways, uniting crowds, and encouraging full emotional release through sound.

Performing across Europe and Asia, including club stages in Ibiza, EL PADRE has earned a reputation for ceremonial, emotionally charged sets that resonate long after the final note. His signature message: the journey begins when you follow the sound.

ilse dorine crafts introspective techno journeys defined by hypnotic patterns, deep rolling bass, and progressive layers that build tension and release with precision. Rooted in atmospheric storytelling, her sound guides dancers into a meditative yet rhythmic state where the dancefloor becomes a place of inner movement. As part of the ROOTED collective, she holds a bi-monthly residency at Toekomstmuziek, championing forward-thinking techno and community-driven culture within Amsterdam’s underground scene.

KITA is a Rotterdam based DJ shaping a distinct sound within the Groove and Schranz landscape. His sets are defined by sharp precision, tightly controlled energy, and a clean rhythmic structure that keeps momentum high from start to finish. Focused and deliberate in his approach, he blends both genres with discipline, offering a streamlined yet powerful experience built for fast paced dancefloors.

Skollaris is a rising electronic music artist whose sound blends high-intensity hard techno with deep, hypnotic industrial textures. Known for powerful grooves, dramatic builds, and sharp rhythmic precision, he delivers sets that command the dancefloor with energy and emotional tension. His work reflects a modern underground identity shaped by European techno influences.

As “Thoder” Thomas Creutzburg has spent years exploring the possibilities of electronic music. His foundation lies in the versatility of house where he combines minimal textures with tech house drive and warm groovy rhythms. Inspired by both classic and contemporary influences he approaches every set with intention and creativity. His goal is simple yet powerful to create memorable experiences that connect people through movement energy and atmosphere. Whether shaping a late night club set or curating a more intimate groove his identity as an artist is defined by consistency experimentation and a deep passion for sound.

Daniel Weirdo is a techno DJ and producer from Budapest, Hungary, carving his space within the contemporary techno scene through intense, high-energy performances and a no-compromise approach to sound. His style blends driving peak-time rhythms with harder techno elements, creating powerful sets designed for late-night dancefloors.

Based in one of Central Europe’s most vibrant underground scenes, Daniel Weirdo draws influence from industrial textures, hypnotic grooves, and modern techno aesthetics. His performances focus on flow, tension, and impact, delivering immersive experiences that resonate with both underground crowds and club-focused audiences.

MØTEK is a relentless force driven by the raw power of hardgroove and hardbounce, delivering high-intensity sets packed with nonstop momentum and heavy, rolling rhythms. Known for his energetic sound and fast-paced groove, MØTEK creates an unstoppable rave atmosphere where the bass hits hard and the crowd never stands still.

With a strong focus on high-energy nightlife and keeping the crowd locked in motion, MØTEK brings a fresh and powerful presence behind the decks. Every set is designed as a full-throttle experience: intense, euphoric, and built for late-night warehouse sessions and high-impact festival stages.

Biography: The Alias of Jay-Dee Verheem, a Techno Producer/DJ based in Johannesburg South Africa. He started making a name for himself with releases on Techno Labels such as Kurai, Set About & Animarum to name a few. His style is highly focused on the dark, disturbing and nightmarish sounds coupled with immensely tribal based grooves and hard hitting bass-lines layered with Trance'esque synths. His perspective when it comes to music can be attributed to the philosophy of “obZen”, which means finding Zen in the obscene and obscure.

DAVID PHOENIX is the alias of Hungarian DJ and producer David Janecska, an artist whose journey through electronic music spans more than twenty years. Beginning his production work in 2003, David explored a wide range of styles inspired by early breakbeat and techno before developing a deep connection to the Drum & Bass scene, where he refined his ear for rhythm, structure, and sound design.

In 2017, he returned to his techno roots, blending minimal aesthetics with the complex sound design of psy and neuro influences. The result is a distinctive, tightly controlled sound defined by steady grooves, hypnotic tension, and precision-crafted production. Under his DAVID PHOENIX alias, launched in 2019, he released his debut EP “Cybercrime” on Dense Audio in 2020.

Since then, DAVID PHOENIX has become one of the fastest-growing names in minimal techno, with multiple Beatport Top 100 charting releases and performances across Europe, Mexico, India, Saudi Arabia, and beyond. In 2023, he expanded his artistic vision by founding VISION SERPENT, a record label dedicated to forward-thinking minimal and psytech releases. With a strong international presence and a clear sonic identity, DAVID PHOENIX continues to evolve as a powerful force on underground dance floors worldwide.

Jack David is a Scottish DJ, producer, and songwriter whose sound blends infectious melodies with slick, polished production. Focused on feel good electronic music, his releases are built to soundtrack warm nights, open air dancefloors, and moments that live beyond the club.

Amsterdam Dance Event 2024 marked the official launch of Jack David as a live act, where he began sharing line ups with international DJs and introducing his sound to a wider global audience. His performances are rooted in groove, melody, and musical storytelling, bringing summer energy and emotional lift to every set.

Behind the scenes, Jack has spent the past four years working extensively as a songwriter, producer, and instrumentalist for a wide range of artists across electronic and pop leaning dance music. Alongside this, he releases under his deep house alias Able Faces, which currently attracts over 750,000 monthly listeners on Spotify.

Across his projects, Jack’s music has accumulated more than 200 million streams to date. What began as a passion project and creative outlet has grown into a fully fledged artist journey, driven by a love for feel good music and authentic sound.

Following the success of his early singles and collaborative releases, it became clear that pursuing the sounds that excite him most was the right path forward. Jack David represents the next chapter of that journey and this is only the beginning.

Sofía Cristo is a celebrated DJ and producer from Madrid whose career is defined by rediscovery, resilience, and unstoppable energy. Raised in a family of performers, she was immersed in music from an early age. By the age of 14, she had already fallen in love with electronic music, and by 18, she was actively carving out her place in Spain’s club scene, driven by passion, persistence, and an unmistakable sound.

With over 20 years of experience behind the decks, Sofía has evolved into a powerful and authentic force within modern electronic music. Her journey through addiction and recovery, including more than 12 years of sobriety, has shaped not only her personal life but also her artistic voice. Today, she is a strong advocate for mental health within nightlife culture, using her platform to inspire others through openness and lived experience.

Musically, Sofía Cristo blends hyper techno, hard dance, and neo rave with raw emotion and relentless intensity. Her sets are high impact, fast paced, and deeply expressive, reflecting both her evolution as an artist and her commitment to the dancefloor. Each performance is charged with purpose, energy, and connection.

With new releases and international collaborations on the horizon, Sofía Cristo continues to expand her presence beyond Spain and onto the global stage. She is not just telling her story through music, she is living it one powerful beat at a time.

Biography: FJDR is a high-energy DJ rooted in 90s-inspired dance music, blending hard house, trance, and piano-driven grooves with modern club intensity. Based in Utrecht, FJDR delivers euphoric, fast-paced sets designed to keep dancefloors moving from start to finish. Biography: Alessandro Ginevri is a multi-instrumentalist and composer with a background in guitar, flute, and vocal performance, blending IDM, ambient, cinematic, and experimental soundscapes. Biography:
Born in Colombia, based in the United States, and frequently active in São Paulo and Netherlands Jhonatan Ospina is one of the most authentic names in the global techno scene. He stands out for blending powerful rhythms and deep sound textures, creating a hypnotic, exciting, and meaningful atmosphere on the dance floor.

With sets recorded in Brazilian cultural spaces such as Centro Cultural Vila Itororó and Theatro Municipal, performed at house mag festival and ADE, and high-level audiovisual productions at the helipad of the Mercure Hotel in São Paulo, he captures attention with hybrid performances and control of the theremini—a Moog synth that corresponds to a modern version of the theremin, one of the first electronic instruments created, where hand gestures are detected by sensors and converted into sounds.

Traversing genres such as melodic techno, minimal, and progressive techno, Ospina has delivered significant releases, including "Space" via Kollektiv Black, "Addicted to You"—a collaboration with Brazilian singer-songwriter Cris Piza, a judge on the Record TV show "Canta Comigo"—and "Mistery" with Cactunes Records, the music video of which won an award at the Miami Street International Film Festival.

He received an award

Kate Hex is a techno DJ and producer from Hungary who began her music career in 2023 and has rapidly established herself as one of the most promising new names in the scene. Her sound bridges classic techno foundations with modern, driving and peak-time elements, resulting in energetic and forward-thinking sets.

She has released music on respected labels including Set About, Extima, and Mainground Music, with her productions receiving support from leading artists such as Enrico Sangiuliano, Pan-Pot, Joris Voorn, Kevin de Vries, Carl Cox, Juliet Fox, Oliver Huntemann, Teenage Mutants, and Karotte.

Kate Hex’s tracks have been played at major festivals and venues worldwide, including Awakenings, EDC Las Vegas, Mysteryland, Ozora, Exit Festival, Untold, Sziget Festival, Printworks London, Ritter Butzke, and Sisyphos Berlin. Her growing international presence has taken her across Europe and overseas to Australia.

With a distinctive style and strong momentum, Kate Hex continues to carve out her place on global dancefloors.
RecordLabelId: Set About x Extima x Mainground Music

Biography:
Liam black, aka BushFrog, is a Johannesburg based Psytech and Bushprog DJ signed to Alpaka Muzik (Canada) and a founding member of the BushMob collective.

Liam fell in love with the psychedelic, cyber soundscapes of bushprog and Psytech in 2023 due to the complex and dynamic structures within the production itself, as well as the emotions it evokes. 

Now, in 2026, Liam and the bushmob collective have been making waves, locally and globally, by bringing international artists to South African soil and providing a platform for the music to be heard.

Mozambican Artist Double Drop brings a new creative lymph, riding on the evolution of the times but always tied to his roots. With the aim of de-personifying art, his music has no face—a concept mentioned in magazines such as Mixmag and DJMag.

This project has taken Mozambican culture to places that were unbelievable in the past. Using his platform to introduce new names to the electronic scene in Mozambique, Double Drop always seeks to learn and teach.

Signed with major labels like Sondela, MoBlack, and Go Deeva. He also founded his own label, Xibalo, focusing on afro and organic content.
From the vibrant stages of Eswatini to the underground clubs of Berlin, Double Drop brings the Mozambican sound to the world. With performances across South Africa, Italy, Mauritius, Germany, and beyond, the journey continues to expand.

COUNTRIES PERFORMED
South Africa
Italy
Mauritius
Germany
Eswatini
Mozambique

4YÛ is the alias of New York City–based DJ and electronic music producer Gabriel Uy, known for high-energy trance and progressive records built to lift crowds onto the mainstage wavelength. Emerging as an artist in his early twenties, he has steadily grown into a versatile act whose sound fuses Big Room power with melodic, uplifting trance and progressive house influences. In 2024 he debuted in Canada at Vancouver’s Levels, premiered a new sound at Dreamstate California, and saw his music reach Tomorrowland, underscoring his growing global momentum. Supported by names like MaRLo, Andrew Rayel and B Jones, and with releases on respected labels such as Find Your Harmony, Reaching Altitude and Interplay, 4YÛ continues to push a euphoric, emotionally charged sound designed to elevate spirits on and off the dancefloor.

FLING is a 22-year-old DJ from Arnhem bringing high-energy hard house and trance to the forefront of the underground scene. Known for electrifying sets that blend driving basslines with euphoric melodies, FLING creates an intense and immersive experience designed to move both body and mind.
With a fast-growing presence and a passion for pushing energy to its limits, FLING is carving out a distinct sound that resonates with the new generation of rave culture. Focused on momentum, connection, and pure adrenaline, every set is built to leave a lasting impact.

TARAH & BRAD PERR’S is a family project born from a true shared passion for music. Originally from Verbier in the Swiss Alps and raised in Aarau, this twin duo grew up in an environment full of contrasts, a diversity they now express through their musical universe.

For them, music is a deeper form of expression, a way to transmit emotion and create unique and authentic moments. Their style blends intensity, emotion and unity, firmly rooted in Melodic House.

Luca Belluco is a Marseille based DJ and producer shaping emotional melodic techno with hypnotic rhythms and deep atmospheric energy. Known for his expressive sets and powerful sound design, Luca has performed at festival stages, underground clubs and private showcases across France and Europe. He is also a resident on Maxximum Radio (Radio FG), where he curates immersive sonic journeys for listeners. His music blends ethnic textures, cinematic layers and driving percussive grooves that create an evocative, high-energy dancefloor experience.

Biography:
🌀 Crystal Bitch is an Amsterdam based, Irish DJ on a mission to spin crystal charged chaos. After starting her DJ journey only 2 years ago, Crystal bitch has been making bold moves across the Amsterdam and European scene. With some highlights including playing Melkweg MainStage with Raving Charlie, closing OT301 as a resident of Energy Amsterdam and a 3 hour closing Copenhagen debut in Module. 

A multi-genre artist specialising in Hard Techno and Hard Bounce, and and Trance her sets are high-energy, unrelenting, and impossible to stand still. With her chaotic energy and careful selection Crystal Bitch conjures an explosive fusion of rhythm, connection, and raw energy. Always bringing the crowd on journey, always creating dance floor alchemy 🌀

Nick Grater has been a stalwart powerhouse of the techno industry in South Africa for more than two
decades. As with any DJ, his career began humbly with a simple residence at Atomic in Johannesburg.
From these humble beginnings rose a force to be reckoned with. Nick has almost single-highhandedly kept
the techno scene rolling forward in South Africa like an unstoppable steamroller of beats with the birth of
Teknotribe events in 2003.
As a firm believer in underground purism, Nick is recognized as one of the top techno performers in the
country and a proud ambassador for this genre overseas. His intelligent, energetic, hard, driving style has
secured him a reputation as one of the finest and most technically adept DJ/producers in South Africa.
Speaking of producing, Nick can boast of several fertile collaborations, as well as successful solo tracks,
released on world-class record labels – Stick Recordings, Techburst, Black Void, Hydraulix, Smitten,
Maximum Minimum, Cluster, Routemaster, Powertools, Underground Africa, Black Robin and Stay Up
Forever, as well as Nick's Teknotribe records.
Seemingly unstoppable, Nick’s tireless dedication, talent and passion have seen his career expand past our
shores toward global stages and his incredible skill and phenomenal presence behind the decks have
ensured his name feature on an international level in clubs and events in UK, Brazil, Germany, Slovakia and
in Africa.
Nick has shared the stage with top international DJ’s Sam Paganini, Julian Jeweil, Boris Brejcha, Cosmic
Boys, Joseph Capriati, Wehbba, Dave Clark, Luigi Madonna, Victor Ruiz, Christian Smith, Alex Stein,
NoNameLeft, Oliver Huntemann, Industrialyzer, Olivier Giacamatto, Chris Liberator, D.A.V.E The Drummer,
to name a few.
Nick’s overriding passion and enthusiasm for techno, have secured its future in South Africa. Known
countrywide by punter, producer, festival and club promoter/owners, label owners and DJ alike, Nick
commands respect both in his achievements behind the decks and behind the scenes. Nick is a true pioneer
and ambassador of the underground electronic dance movement and more specifically the techno genre.
He is also the mastermind behind Twilight Festival, Revolution NYE, Bloom Festival, Fenomena Festival and
hosts numerous indoor events namely Underground Sound, Teknotribe, Newtown Takeover, Nomadic and
Halloween Rave.

DJ Kaputski / DJ Kapøtski's was born in Utrecht but he is living in Nieuwegein, The Netherlands. Since 1995 he is a Dutch DJ and producer.

Main style:
'Holy House Music': International Harder styles of House Music such as Latino Schranz Hard Techno / House Music with opera and church choirs influences, but he also loves House Classics and other minimal harder styles such as (early) Hardstyle and (early) Hardcore. 

He is a multilingual, so you might find several languages (from Dutch to English and Spanish) in his music, therefore he cannot really be put in one specific box. He likes passionate other worldy kinds of sounds that stand out and are energetic and full of power and sometimes even contain beautiful symphony and melody lines, although (in secret), he personally prefers and loves the more minimal and harder industrial sounds...

Biography: Driven by creativity, consistency, and a genuine love for techno, DREW continues to grow as an artist while bringing fresh energy and memorable vibes to every performance. With an expanding audience and a commitment to musical excellence, DREW is quickly becoming a standout name in the local nightlife scene in South Africa.

Eclectic tastes, curiosity, and authenticity are what Karmerr is composed of. The South African DJ, writer, producer, dancer, live-r, laugh-er, love-r creates and operates intuitively, finding a way to immerse her essence into those spaces and communities doing proper nonsense, you know?

Playing monthly around Johannesburg, frequently in Cape Town, and a few times internationally (namely in Cairo and London), Karmerr brings an infectious energy into the booth and onto the dancefloor. Although versatile, playing everything from ambient to dub step, minimal seems to be the glue holding all her sonic tools together.

She is also the mistress (I.E., curator) of TOYTOY’s Bordello and has releases on a few South African labels, as well as self-released music on Bandcamp.

Biography:
Tank Girl is a renowned Techno DJ celebrated for her powerful, high-energy performances and distinctive sound. Specializing in Full-On Peak Time and Driving Techno, she is known for delivering pounding basslines, hypnotic grooves, and seductive vocal elements that ignite dance floors and captivate crowds.

With an impressive 21 years behind the decks, Tank Girl has established herself as a dynamic and influential force within the electronic music scene. Her journey into electronic music began in the psy trance scene before evolving into techno in 2008, where she found her passion for harder, driving sounds and launched her techno project. This evolution allowed her to craft a unique style that seamlessly blends intensity, emotion, and raw underground energy.

Tank Girl has mastered the art of taking audiences on an unforgettable sonic journey. Her sets fuse powerful rhythms, atmospheric melodies, and relentless energy, creating immersive experiences that leave a lasting impact long after the music stops.

Known for her commanding stage presence and ability to connect deeply with the crowd, Tank Girl continues to push boundaries and bring authentic underground techno energy to every performance.

ResidentLocation: The Temple ( South African Hard Techno events)

Biography:
Slava Presnyakov was Born in Ukraine, raised in The Netherlands. Conservatory-trained pianist (Conservatory of Amsterdam Master of Music 2010). Producer & DJ with releases on labels including Iboga Records, Ibogatech, Synk87, Alien Records and more. My coaching bridges classical musicianship with modern production: fast, practical, and musically deep.


Performed 750+ concerts over the world. Including classical music, pop & electronic. Won several 1st prizes at national Piano competitions.
Over 30 releases with major electronic music labels.
25+ years of music related experience. Worked on YouTube channels reaching 2.5M+ subscribers and 500M+ views.
Bachelor's & Master's degree on classical piano.

Keleo, born Leonard Slabbinck, is a rising star in Europe’s electronic music scene, known for his high-energy, emotive sets and signature concept A Trip 2 Euphoria. 

The artist gained early attention with euphoric renditions of Adele’s “Set Fire to the Rain” and “Belong Together”, leading to the creation of a dedicated fanbase spanning 4 continents. In 2024, Keleo made his London debut at Ministry of Sound, leading to more shows throughout that & the following year. 

2025 has started off strong, gaining radio support in over 4 countries, signing with Berklee-graduate founded Vocal Aura, receiving ongoing mentorship from Danny Whittle, under the IMS mentorship programme, and recently getting his first official remix opportunity for ALLERTZ. Currently signed with one of South Africa’s most accomplished Artist Managers, Keleo’s future as an internationally-acclaimed act is looking bright.

Biography:
Erik Scuka is an emerging DJ and producer shaping a new wave of progressive house and EDM. With a strong focus on emotion, energy, and storytelling, his sound blends modern festival power with the nostalgic essence of the golden era of electronic music.

After years behind the decks and stepping into music production in 2025, Erik is quickly building his identity through dynamic DJ sets and original productions. His performances are driven by connection—creating moments where people and music come together as one.

As the creator of Horizon, a concept built around immersive musical experiences, Erik aims to go beyond the standard event, delivering a journey that reflects his artistic vision and passion for electronic music.

With a clear ambition to grow within the global EDM scene, Erik Scuka is focused on developing a unique sound and leaving a lasting impact on every stage he steps on.

Biography: Gravitating mainly toward Groove Techno, psy & House, D1 Merlon enjoys diving into the many hypnotic sub-genres that exist within them. He finds inspiration in the idea of not having a "sound" at all. For him, the freedom to move between moods, genres, and influences is what keeps the music exciting. Each set becomes a reflection of the moment — shaped by the crowd, the environment, and the ever-changing sounds of the South African underground.

FROGR was born in late 2024 as the bouncy new alias of the Dutch DJ known as Orbyte. Leaving the pond with a leap of pure passion, FROGR channels the golden age of rave blending euphoric trance, scratching hardhouse, and raw eurorave into a sound that he calls “frog rave”.

Inspired by the 90s and 00s, FROGR acts as a kind of musical journalist, digging deep into the archives to revive forgotten gems and timeless anthems and sounds, reshaping them for today’s dancefloors. These sounds inspired him to create his own music in which he upgrades his sets a bit further. His sets are fast-paced journeys at 145 BPM, designed to make crowds smile, jump, and lose themselves in the euphoria of classic rave culture.

Since his debut, FROGR has made an explosive entrance onto the international stage. From London’s underground clubs, starting at Fusion in Basing House and later closing the night at EGG and XOYO after Jorn van Deynhoven and Ruben de Ronde to appearances at Amsterdam Dance Event and High Voltage Recordings label nights, FROGR has proven his ability to captivate audiences with pure rave energy. 

What began as a small alias has already grown into a movement: one that reconnects people to the roots of dance music while giving it a fresh, unstoppable drive. With goosebumps, adrenaline, and tears of joy on the dancefloor; FROGR is here to make the world GET FROGD!
